2025-26 Men's Basketball Roster

1 Caleb Thomas

  • Height 6-7
  • Weight 195
  • Class Freshman
  • Hometown Martinsburg, W.Va.
  • Bio
  • Related
  • Stats

Biography

As a Freshman (2025-26)
  •  Appeared in 6 games, scoring 14 points while shooting 6-for-10 from the field, 1-for-2 on 3-pointers and 1-for-5 at the line.
  • Added 11 rebounds (4 offensive), 6 blocks, 4 assists and 1 steal.
